---
title: "Jane Fortescue Coleridge Lady"
---

## Jane Fortescue Coleridge Lady

**Dates:** (1824/5-1878)

**Maiden name:** (Seymour)

### Description

wife of John Duke Coleridge

### Biography

She was the daughter of a clergyman in the Isle of Wight, and married (1846) John Duke Coleridge.  Her sister married Robert Sewell, sheriff of the IOW, who was perhaps a relation of Elizabeth Missing Sewell?  In the dialogue printed by Coleridge as an appendix she reports on the Sewells. [1861 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 7th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from April 28th 1857
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
